notes: Background audio fixes for app-minimize and screen-off. (1) Media Session metadata is now registered BEFORE audioEl.play() — Android Chrome decides whether to grant background-audio privileges at the moment play() fires, so registering after was letting it flag the page as 'non-media' and pause us on background. (2) Dropped the 1×1 transparent PNG artwork; with no artwork passed, Chrome falls back to the manifest icon (headphones SVG), which Android handles better. (3) Acquire a screen wake lock while audio plays and re-acquire on return-to-foreground; helps keep the page alive across app-switches.
